---
title: "Responsible Research Metrics Self-Study Module"
---

#### Welcome to this self-study module

This self-study module covers the core principles of responsible research metrics and can be completed in your own time.

This module is designed for:

-   Anyone who is interested in how research is measured and assessed;
-   Anyone involved in recruitment, reward and recognition processes or grant applications where research may be used as an assessment tool.

Everyone should complete Sections 1, 2, and 3. Section 4 is for those who are involved in recruitment, reward and recognition processes, or grant applications as an assessor of people. Section 5 contextualizes this information within the United Kingdom's Research Excellence Framework (REF), and discusses how research metrics may be relevant for REF2029. 

For help please contact the Research Intelligence Librarian via n.richards1\@derby.ac.uk ![](images/LYL_Red.png.png){fig-alt="Red Love Your Library logo" fig-align="left" width=10%}
